# The Pressure Academy

> Public website for The Pressure Academy, including the main site and public Mastery Method pages.
> This file lists public-facing pages only. Protected portal routes and internal docs are intentionally excluded.

- https://thepressureacademy.com/ — Main homepage for The Pressure Academy and its public site entry point.
- https://thepressureacademy.com/privacy-policy.html — Privacy policy covering site forms, Mastery Method booking, scorecard submissions, and portal/session handling.
- https://thepressureacademy.com/mastery-method/ — Mastery Method overview and main public landing page.
- https://thepressureacademy.com/mastery-method/about — Background on Mastery Method and its approach.
- https://thepressureacademy.com/mastery-method/clarity — Public explanation of The Mastery Method Framework.
- https://thepressureacademy.com/mastery-method/for-parents — Parent-focused explanation of how Mastery Method works.
- https://thepressureacademy.com/mastery-method/programs — Program structure and offer overview.
- https://thepressureacademy.com/mastery-method/pricing — Public pricing and offer summary.
- https://thepressureacademy.com/mastery-method/book — Booking and enquiry page for Learning Support Calls.
- https://thepressureacademy.com/mastery-method/scorecard — Public Clarity Scorecard page.
- https://thepressureacademy.com/mastery-method/resources — Public overview of Mastery Method resources.
